---
title: "Mammals"
format: html
---

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| message: false

library(dplyr); library(knitr); library(kableExtra)

sp_list <- read.csv(here::here("../LaSelva-MetaNetwork-data/data/L1/L1_harmonized_names/mammal_sp_list.csv"))

df <- sp_list %>%
  arrange(order, family, species) %>%
  distinct(order, family, species)

index_order <- table(df$order)

names(index_order) <- paste0(names(index_order)
)

kable(df[, 1:3], escape = FALSE, booktabs = TRUE) %>%
  pack_rows(index = index_order) 

```
